hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=resource-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD)" = 1 ] || fail "The baseline should contain one commit."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --format=%s)" = 'Start neighborhood resource guide' ] || fail "The baseline commit message is not correct."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The baseline is recorded, but unfinished work remains."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" README.md pages/contact.md pages/old-note.md pages/welcome.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The baseline tracked file set is not correct."

set -eu
repo=resource-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD)" = 2 ] || fail "The repository should contain two commits."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --format=%s)" = 'Add local services page' ] || fail "The newest commit message does not match the requested services checkpoint."
expected_services=$(printf '%s\n' '- Food pantry' '- Health clinic' '- Job center')
actual_services=$(git -C "$repo" show HEAD:pages/services.md)

expected=$(printf "%s\n" README.md pages/contact.md pages/old-note.md pages/services.md pages/welcome.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct after the services checkpoint."

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=resource-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD)" = 3 ] || fail "The existing history should contain three commits."
[ "$(cat "$repo/.gitignore")" = 'generated/' ] || fail "The ignore policy does not contain the requested generated directory rule."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n" .gitignore)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "Only the ignore policy should be staged at this milestone."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q generated/preview.html || fail "The generated preview is not ignored."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" .gitignore README.md pages/contact.md pages/old-note.md pages/services.md pages/welcome.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked source files changed before the cleanup milestone."

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=resource-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD)" = 3 ] || fail "Existing history should still contain three commits at this milestone."
[ "$(cat "$repo/README.md")" = '# Neighborhood Resource Guide' ] || fail "The accidental README edit was not fully restored."
! git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | grep -qx 'README.md' || fail "README.md is still staged."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" .gitignore pages/getting-help.md pages/old-note.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The staged cleanup does not contain exactly the ignore policy, rename, and obsolete-note removal."
[ ! -e "$repo/pages/welcome.md" ] || fail "The old welcome-page path still exists."
[ -f "$repo/pages/getting-help.md" ] || fail "The renamed getting-help page is missing."
[ ! -e "$repo/pages/old-note.md" ] || fail "The obsolete note still exists in the working tree."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q generated/preview.html || fail "The generated preview is not ignored."

requiredCommands.pattern: ^git\s+commit\s+\-m\s+(?:"Prepare resource guide handoff"|\'Prepare resource guide handoff\')$

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=resource-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD)" = 4 ] || fail "The final history should contain four commits."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --format=%s)" = 'Prepare resource guide handoff' ] || fail "The final handoff commit message is not correct."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The final repository is not clean."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" .gitignore README.md pages/contact.md pages/getting-help.md pages/services.md | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The final tracked file set is not correct."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" show HEAD:README.md)" = '# Neighborhood Resource Guide' ] || fail "README.md should remain in the final handoff."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" show HEAD:pages/contact.md)" = 'Help desk closes at 5 PM.' ] || fail "The final contact page has the wrong closing time."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q generated/preview.html || fail "The generated preview is not ignored."
[ ! -e "$repo/pages/old-note.md" ] || fail "The obsolete note still exists."
[ ! -e "$repo/pages/welcome.md" ] || fail "The old welcome-page path still exists."

starterFiles.content:
- Food pantry
- Health clinic
- Job center

learningGoals: Create and configure a repository from an ordinary project folder
Edit, inspect, stage, and commit two focused content changes
Create and verify an ignore policy for generated previews
Unstage and restore an accidental edit before structural cleanup
Rename and remove tracked paths, then audit the four-commit handoff
